zh.Castle Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾登布藍
zh.Abernathy, Fifeshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭音巴內-爾阿波內
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander de Abernethy於1271年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾阿波內時，他的父親Sir Hugh Abernethy57歲，母親Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn37歲。他於大約1290年與Margaret de Menteith在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾阿波內結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。他去世於1315年在蘇格蘭培爾阿波內享年44歲。

zh-hans.Castle Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰斯林史爾登布藍
zh-hans.Abernathy, Fifeshire, Scotland: 苏格兰音巴內-爾阿波內
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander de Abernethy于1271年出生在英国苏格兰培爾阿波內时，他的父亲Sir Hugh Abernethy57岁，母亲Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn37岁。他于大约1290年与Margaret de Menteith在苏格兰音巴內-爾阿波內结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。他去世于1315年在苏格兰培爾阿波內享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Abernethy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Abernathy
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Abernethy in southeastern Perthshire. The placename is of Pictish origin, meaning ‘mouth of the river Nethy’.

History: This was the name of a cadet branch of MacDuff earls of Fife and one of the surnames of the Scots who settled in northern Ireland during the ‘plantation’ in the 17th century, and it was brought to the US as the name of a Southern plantation owner (in a different sense of the word ‘plantation’).

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander de Abernethy was born in 1271, in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Hugh Abernethy, was 57 and his mother, Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn, was 37. He married Margaret de Menteith about 1290, in Abernethy, Inverness-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. He died in 1315, in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander de Abernethy est né en 1271, à Abernethy, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Hugh Abernethy, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Menteith environ 1290, à Abernethy, Inverness-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1315, à Abernethy, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander de Abernethy 1271 in Abernethy, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh Abernethy 57 und seine Mutter Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn 37. Er hat um 1290 in Abernethy, Inverness-shire, Scotland Margaret de Menteith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Er starb 1315 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander de Abernethy è nato il nel 1271 nel Abernethy, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Hugh Abernethy, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Menteith circa 1290, nel Abernethy, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì nel 1315, nel Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.Castle Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland: イギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアダンブラン
ja.Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland: スコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーネシー
ja.Abernathy, Fifeshire, Scotland: スコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアアバーネシー
ja.lifeSummary: Alexander de Abernethyが1271年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーネシーで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Abernethyは57歳，母Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearnは37歳であった。約1290年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアアバーネシーでMargaret de Menteithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼は1315年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーネシーで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander de Abernethy(이)가 1271년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 압어네시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Abernethy(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn(은)는 37세였다. 그는 대략 1290년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 압어네시에서 Margaret de Menteith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1315년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 압어네시에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Castle Dunblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland: Dunblane, Striviling, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander de Abernethy nasceu em 1271, em Abernethy, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Hugh Abernethy, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Menteith aproximadamente 1290, em Abernethy, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1315, em Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander de Abernethy родился в 1271 г. в местности абирнети, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Abernethy было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Menteith около 1290 г. в местности абирнети, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1315 г. в местности абирнети, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander de Abernethy nació en 1271, en Abernethy, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Hugh Abernethy, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Maire MacEoghan MacDougall Countess of Strathearn, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Margaret de Menteith aproximadamente 1290, en Abernethy, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Murió en 1315, en Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 44 años.
